Apply for an environmental permit

The government will publish guidance on 20 April 2026.

The Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs (Defra) will work with the Environment Agency (EA), local planning authorities (LPAs) and the Welsh Government.

Developers must submit one biodiversity net gain assessment by 9 am.

The project budget is £3 million.

The service will reduce manual review time by 25%.

The organisation must use British English throughout.
